nasb.text: The total of the numbered men of the camp of Ephraim: 108,100, by their armies. And they shall set out third.

esv.text: All those listed of the camp of Ephraim, by their companies, were 108,100. They shall set out third on the march.

cnv.text: 凡是屬以法蓮營，按著隊伍被數點的，共有十萬零八千一百人；他們要作第三隊起行。

ccb.text: 以法莲营区共十万八千一百人，他们是第三队。
